programme.title: Vanishing on 7th Street
programme.desc: Darkness empties Detroit, except for a few people (Hayden Christensen, Thandie Newton) who band together to battle it with light.

programme.title: Mandibles
programme.desc: Two hapless losers discover a giant fly in the trunk of a stolen car and decide to domesticate it in a bizarre get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Censor
programme.desc: Film censor Enid (Niamh Algar, Wrath of Man) is assigned to review a disturbing film that recalls her childhood memories. She begins to unravel how this eerie work might be tied to the long-ago disappearance of her sister.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective, despondent over the murder of his wife and forced to resign, is brought back to the force when a new serial killer begins taunting him ... who turns out to be a werewolf.

programme.title: Broken Trail
programme.desc: Two horse herders must protect a group of Chinese women from the criminals who plan to sell them into slavery in the 1890's Wild West.

programme.title: Broken Trail
programme.desc: Two horse herders must protect a group of Chinese women from the criminals who plan to sell them into slavery in the 1890's Wild West.

programme.title: Broken Trail

programme.title: Good Day For A Hanging
programme.desc: The central performances of Fred MacMurray as a U.S. Marshal and Robert Vaughn as a psychopathic killer make this an unusual and absorbing Western. MacMurray must prove his charismatic young captive guilty of murder against much opposition.

programme.title: In The Line of Fire
programme.desc: An assassin (John Malkovich) toys with a White House Secret Service agent (Clint Eastwood) haunted for 30 years by his failure in 1963 Dallas.

programme.title: In The Line of Fire

programme.title: Last Action Hero
programme.desc: Action-adventure superstar Arnold Schwarzenegger bursts through the screen as a larger-than-life movie hero in this nonstop adventure from acclaimed director John McTiernan (Predator, Die Hard).

programme.title: Looper
programme.desc: A mob hit man (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) comes to the chilling realization that his latest assignment is his older self (Bruce Willis), sent back in time by his bosses.

programme.title: Chappie
programme.desc: A stolen police robot (Sharlto Copley) is given new programming which allows him to feel and think for himself. However, his new capabilities pose a threat to certain powerful forces who will stop at nothing to destroy him.

programme.title: Short Circuit
programme.desc: When lovable mechanical marvel Number Five escapes Nova Robotics and ends up on Ally Sheedy's doorstep, the adventure has just begun! This endearing comedy is fun for the whole family, with top-notch performances and a cracker-jack pace.

programme.title: Short Circuit 2
programme.desc: Harmless military robot No. 5 goes to the city, where people (Fisher Stevens, Michael McKean, Cynthia Gibb) see him as a marketable novelty item.

programme.title: District 9
programme.desc: From producer Peter Jackson and director Neill Blomkamp comes a startlingly original science-fiction thriller where alien refugees, stranded on Earth, are exiled to a slum on the fringes of Johannesburg.

programme.desc: Three days before Christmas, a woman who has never known her father receives a clue concerning his whereabouts. She follows the trail to a beautiful New England town where she meets a handsome young man willing to help with the search.

programme.title: Christmas Festival of Ice
programme.desc: Emma is determined to keep her hometown's Christmas ice-sculpting contest going. She enlists sponsors and artists, but Nick, the town's ace artisan, isn't interested in competing until he sees what Emma has accomplished.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.sub-title: Malaysian Flying Noodles and Pork Bone Soup
programme.desc: In Kuala Lumpur, Luke meets the famous Mr Hung with a reputation for flying instant noodles and Mr Sou who cooks a hearty Pork Bone Soup with medicinal herbal properties.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food adventure exploring Jakarta, a melting pot of diverse cultural cuisines, where he indulges in an Indonesian dessert, the sweet Martabak, known as the "King of Street Food".

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food journey in Bangkok where he searches for the best Tom Yum soup and entertains the locals with a rare Thai delicacy.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.sub-title: Malaysian Flying Noodles and Pork Bone Soup
programme.desc: In Kuala Lumpur, Luke meets the famous Mr Hung with a reputation for flying instant noodles and Mr Sou who cooks a hearty Pork Bone Soup with medicinal herbal properties.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food adventure exploring Jakarta, a melting pot of diverse cultural cuisines, where he indulges in an Indonesian dessert, the sweet Martabak, known as the "King of Street Food".

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food journey in Bangkok where he searches for the best Tom Yum soup and entertains the locals with a rare Thai delicacy.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.sub-title: Exploring the Night Markets of Bangalore
programme.desc: Luke heads to the city of Bangalore in southern India, where he visits MTR, one of the oldest coffee houses in the city, learns how to make idli and meets up with a friend to explore the night markets.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke learns about Kongunadu cuisine in Coimbatore, partners with a family in Thrissur to create an authentic delicacy and learns about India's rich coffee culture.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke visits the port city of Kochi, Kerala, where he checks out the iconic Chinese fishing nets, does laundry the old-fashioned way and cooks a famous dish. He leaves the city to witness the state's backwaters and local fishing techniques.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.sub-title: Hunting for Ancient Spices in Thekkady
programme.desc: Luke visits the lush plantations of spices in Thekkady and then tours Madurai, the spiritual heart of Tamil Nadu, to find hidden gems with the help of a local food journalist.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.sub-title: The Outrageous Street Food of Pondicherry
programme.desc: Luke uncovers the history of Chettinad and savours its famous cuisine. He then tastes the chutneys in Kumbakonam and explores the exciting food scene in Pondicherry.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.sub-title: Exploring the Night Markets of Bangalore
programme.desc: Luke heads to the city of Bangalore in southern India, where he visits MTR, one of the oldest coffee houses in the city, learns how to make idli and meets up with a friend to explore the night markets.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke learns about Kongunadu cuisine in Coimbatore, partners with a family in Thrissur to create an authentic delicacy and learns about India's rich coffee culture.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke visits the port city of Kochi, Kerala, where he checks out the iconic Chinese fishing nets, does laundry the old-fashioned way and cooks a famous dish. He leaves the city to witness the state's backwaters and local fishing techniques.

programme.title: Quest for the Fest
programme.desc: In New Orleans, Amy is at the French Quarter Festival taking in a little jazz and a lot of Cajun fare.

programme.title: Quest for the Fest

programme.desc: Matthew's hope of keeping Diana safe is short-lived as Ysabeau refuses to welcome the warmblood; Knox calls an emergency meeting of the Congregation to denounce Matthew; Matthew's ferocious brother, Baldwin, plays a careful game to maintain control.

programme.title: A Discovery of Witches
programme.desc: Matthew's hope of keeping Diana safe is short-lived as Ysabeau refuses to welcome the warmblood; Knox calls an emergency meeting of the Congregation to denounce Matthew; Matthew's ferocious brother, Baldwin, plays a careful game to maintain control.

programme.title: A Discovery of Witches
programme.desc: Gillian pays a price for her disloyalty to Diana; the vampires study witch DNA; the fall-out threatens the fragile equilibrium between creatures and the focus is on ending Matthew and Diana's relationship, whatever the cost.

programme.title: A Discovery of Witches
programme.desc: Satu brutally tortures Diana in Gerbert's isolated castle ruins; Matthew, now sworn to hunt down and kill anyone who tries to harm Diana, attempts a daring airborne rescue mission with Baldwin in tow.

programme.title: A Discovery of Witches
programme.desc: Diana learns the tragic circumstances surrounding why she was spellbound as a child; Diana's devastation at having lived her life as only half herself is interrupted by the Madison house releasing one of the missing pages from Ashmole 782.

programme.title: A Discovery of Witches
programme.desc: Matthew's attempt to rescue Diana from Juliette goes horribly wrong; Diana discovers just how lethal her powers can be; as Matthew is dying, Diana must strike a dreadful bargain with the goddess and make the ultimate sacrificial pact.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Neurosurgeon Rowan Fielding has a problem -- when she gets mad, she kills with her mind; her search for answers sends her toward her secretive biological family; in New Orleans, Deirdre Mayfair is desperate to escape from her aunt's oppressive house.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Wracked with grief over Ellie's death, Rowan is out of control and unfit to perform surgeries; her paranoia that someone is following her is proven true; in New Orleans, Deirdre and her mysterious companion Lasher work together to draw Rowan home.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Deirdre's grisly death, Rowan searches for safety in a strange city; Sip provides Rowan with a safe house while he investigates Deirdre's murder; Lasher makes contact with Rowan, but not in the way one might expect.

programme.title: Carol for Another Christmas
programme.desc: Three ghosts visit a bitter man (Sterling Hayden) who has never recovered from losing his son during World War II.

programme.title: Three Godfathers
programme.desc: In the desert, three Old West outlaws (Chester Morris, Lewis Stone, Walter Brennan) adopt the baby of a dying woman.

programme.title: Star in the Night
programme.desc: The owner of a motel helps a couple on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Christmas Eve
programme.desc: An eccentric spinster's (Ann Harding) three foster sons must reunite to save her estate from a scheming nephew.

programme.title: Bundle of Joy
programme.desc: A salesgirl's (Debbie Reynolds) boss (Adolphe Menjou) thinks his son (Eddie Fisher) fathered the baby that she found on a doorstep.

programme.title: Meet Me in St. Louis
programme.desc: A St. Louis lawyer's (Leon Ames) family (Judy Garland, Margaret O'Brien) stays in town for the 1904 World's Fair.

programme.title: It Happened on 5th Avenue
programme.desc: A hobo (Victor Moore) shares a New York mansion with a veteran (Don DeFore) and others who need a wintertime place to stay.

programme.title: Christmas in Connecticut
programme.desc: The publisher (Sydney Greenstreet) of a women's magazine has his best columnist (Barbara Stanwyck) play holiday host to a Navy hero (Dennis Morgan).

programme.title: The Shop Around the Corner
programme.desc: The more Budapest co-workers (Margaret Sullavan, James Stewart) fight, the more they fall in love as secret pen pals.

programme.title: The Bishop's Wife
